text: Hey Dalton. So I'm recording this quick video to show you what I think may have happened. So you mentioned that there are some products that are missing and then they said they have been found again, but they haven't. You cannot see them as available inventory. But you see here we have some stranded inventory. It's also for the same product, same asin. Now here what happened is. And this is totally Amazon. I think this is totally Amazon. I think they found it and then I don't know what, they probably found some kind of packaging error, but ultimately they found them and they have made these available. If you just click on Create listing and then make this queue available so then it will be added back to your inventory. Basically it will be two SKUs for the same asin for the same product, but you will have all those products available. Now the question is all the units that you have questions about, if you add them up, does that equal to this? That's the question. So please let me know if that's if the math is right. If it is right, then we are good. If not, then we'll have to look into the ledger, which is very time consuming. Alright, so this is it. Thanks.
